id.title: Full-Stack Developer Intern
id.description: Menganalisis kebutuhan bisnis, mendesain database relasional, membuat wireframe UI/UX dan interactive prototype menggunakan Figma, serta mengimplementasikan solusi frontend dan backend untuk aplikasi bisnis berbasis web.

list.title: Tanggung Jawab Utama
items: Mengembangkan fitur frontend dan backend menggunakan Laravel dan MySQL.
Mendesain struktur database relasional dan dokumentasi project.
Membuat wireframe UI/UX dan clickable prototype menggunakan Figma.
Berkolaborasi dengan tim untuk menganalisis kebutuhan bisnis dan memberikan solusi teknis.

en.title: Full-Stack Developer Intern
en.description: Analyzed business requirements, designed relational databases, created UI/UX wireframes and interactive prototypes using Figma, and implemented frontend and backend solutions for web-based business applications.

list.title: Key Responsibilities
items: Developed frontend and backend application features using Laravel and MySQL.
Designed relational database structures and project documentation.
Created UI/UX wireframes and clickable prototypes using Figma.
Collaborated with teams to analyze business requirements and deliver technical solutions.

id.title: Full-Stack Developer
id.description: Mengembangkan dan memelihara aplikasi web dan mobile end-to-end yang mencakup sistem frontend dan backend, integrasi API, manajemen database, serta deployment workflow untuk berbagai solusi enterprise dan client.

list.title: Tanggung Jawab Utama
items: Membangun aplikasi enterprise menggunakan Vue.js, React.js, Laravel, dan FastAPI.
Melakukan integrasi API, database, dan third-party enterprise services.
Mengoptimalkan performa aplikasi dan menjaga scalability sistem.
Mengerjakan platform webinar, visitor management system, dan aplikasi POS berbasis Android.

en.title: Full-Stack Developer
en.description: Developed and maintained end-to-end web and mobile applications, covering frontend and backend systems, API integrations, database management, and deployment workflows for enterprise and client-based solutions.

list.title: Key Responsibilities
items: Built enterprise applications using Vue.js, React.js, Laravel, and FastAPI.
Integrated APIs, databases, and third-party enterprise services.
Optimized application performance and maintained scalable architectures.
Worked on webinar platforms, visitor management systems, and Android-based POS applications.

en.title: Full-Stack Developer
en.description: Led the design team in creating innovative user experiences for Apple's software products, focusing on enhancing usability and accessibility. Worked closely with product managers and engineers to develop design solutions that meet user needs and business objectives.

list.title: Key Responsibilities:
items: Designed user interfaces and experiences for Apple's software products.
Conducted user research and usability testing to inform design decisions.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to ensure design feasibility and implementation.
Mentored junior designers in UX design best practices.

en.title: Full-Stack Developer
en.description: Taught advanced UX design principles and practices to undergraduate and graduate students, focusing on real-world applications and industry standards. Developed course materials and assignments that challenged students to think critically and creatively about user experience design.

list.title: Key Responsibilities:
items: Designed and delivered lectures on UX design methodologies.
Supervised student projects and provided constructive feedback.
Collaborated with industry professionals to keep course content relevant.
Mentored students in their career development and design portfolios.

en.title: Full-Stack Developer
en.description: Overseeing the development and implementation of Agile methodologies within the organization, ensuring projects are delivered on time and within scope. Collaborating with cross-functional teams to manage risks, resources, and stakeholder expectations effectively.

list.title: Key Responsibilities:
items: Facilitated Agile ceremonies such as sprint planning, daily stand-ups, and retrospectives.
Managed project timelines, budgets, and resources to ensure successful delivery.
Collaborated with product owners to prioritize and refine the product backlog.
Identified and mitigated project risks to ensure smooth execution.
